name: CheckPointHEC_SearchEmail
author: Fabien Bloume, StrangeBee
description: Search for an email in Check Point Harmony Email & Collaboration and retrieve its security verdict, phishing confidence, classification and scan results. Accepts an .eml file or a Message-ID as an 'other' observable.

configurationItems.name: client_id
configurationItems.description: Check Point Infinity Portal API Client ID

configurationItems.name: client_secret
configurationItems.description: Check Point Infinity Portal API Secret Key

configurationItems.name: region
configurationItems.description: Check Point HEC region: us, eu, ca, au, uk, uae, in, sg

configurationItems.name: saas
configurationItems.description: SaaS platform to query: office365_emails or google_mail

configurationItems.name: portal_url
configurationItems.description: Check Point HEC portal base URL for direct links (eg https://COMPANYID.checkpointcloudsec.com). Optional.
